message:
fix(clippy): resolve 41 clippy warnings across 16 core modules

Fix all clippy warnings in frankenterm-core --no-default-features build:

- Replace sort_by with sort_by_key + Reverse (swarm_command_center, cutover_evidence)
- Use mul_add for float arithmetic (chaos_scale_harness, traceability_verification, manifest_dep_eradication)
- Remove redundant continue statements (event_stream)
- Use vec![] initializer instead of push (asupersync_observability)
- Use u64::from(bool) instead of if/else (asupersync_observability)
- Replace let...else with ? operator (backup)
- Add missing Eq derive (beta_feedback_loop)
- Remove unnecessary casts and borrows (chaos_scale_harness, fleet_dashboard, patterns, unified_telemetry)
- Box large enum variants (unified_telemetry: PolicyPayload, StoragePayload)
- Replace clone() assignment with clone_from() (fleet_memory_controller, plan)
- Convert if chain to match (fleet_memory_controller)
- Use Option<&T> instead of &Option<T> (ingest)
- Rename similar bindings for clarity (disaster_recovery_drills)
- Replace BTreeMap<K,()> with BTreeSet (robot_sdk_contracts)
- Use format_collect pattern (robot_sdk_contracts)
- Remove unused variable (robot_sdk_contracts, traceability_verification)
- Expand enum wildcard import (unified_telemetry)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
